backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Invitation, Event, RSVP, Photo, Music) and CRUD operations for a wedding invitation SaaS platform, using in-memory Maps for storage and a migration hook.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the invitationStore from OldInvitation (without savedThemes) to NewInvitation (with savedThemes defaulting to an empty array).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (template library expansion, TemplateSelector enhancements, customization panel upgrades) to their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of pages, components, and utilities in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, chart, sidebar variables) applied via @layer base.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, dashboard, invitation editor, create wizard, and guest invitation pages, plus a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RSVPRe: A modal dialog that displays RSVP responses for a given invitation, showing summary stats (total responses, confirmed guests, declined) and a scrollable list of individual responses with guest details.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: A styled card component that displays a single event's details (type, title, date, time, venue, description) with edit and delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/events/EventForm: A form component for creating or editing an event, with fields for event type, title, date, time, venue, and description, supporting both add and edit modes.
frontend/src/components/guest/CountdownT: A live countdown timer component that calculates and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until the wedding date, updating every second.
frontend/src/components/guest/CoupleIntr: A guest-facing section component that displays the invitation message and family details with scroll-triggered animations, styled according to the selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/EventTimel: A guest-facing section that renders a chronologically sorted list of event cards with scroll-triggered animations, each showing event type, date, time, venue, and description.
frontend/src/components/guest/HeroSectio: Renders the full-screen hero section of a wedding invitation page, displaying the couple's names, photo, wedding date, and venue with parallax scrolling and fade-in animation, styled according to the selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/PhotoGalle: Displays a responsive photo grid gallery for a wedding invitation with scroll-triggered animations and a fullscreen lightbox with prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/guest/RSVPForm.t: Provides a styled RSVP form for wedding guests to submit their attendance, guest count, and message, with a success confirmation state after submission.
frontend/src/components/guest/VenueSecti: Displays the wedding venue name, address, and a Google Maps link button, styled with the invitation's template colors and a scroll-triggered animation.
frontend/src/components/guest/WhatsAppSh: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp share link for the wedding invitation URL.
frontend/src/components/layout/Decorativ: Renders a decorative section divider in one of three variants—mandala image, line with dot, or flourish image—with SVG fallback for the mandala variant.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: A fixed site header with logo, desktop navigation links, and a mobile menu toggle that changes styling based on scroll position.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicContr: A fixed floating music player component that supports play/pause, mute, and volume control with autoplay capability. Renders as a collapsible UI in the bottom-right corner of the screen.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicUploa: A form component for uploading background music files (MP3/WAV/M4A) with preview playback and an autoplay toggle, integrated with the InvitationFormContext.
frontend/src/components/media/PhotoGalle: A drag-and-drop photo upload component that reads image files into base64 URLs and displays them in a responsive grid with individual delete support, backed by InvitationFormContext.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component supporting four variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) with configurable item count using Shadcn Skeleton primitives.
frontend/src/components/templates/ColorS: A grid-based color scheme selector that displays color swatches for each scheme option and highlights the currently selected one with a gold checkmark.
frontend/src/components/templates/FontSe: A grid-based font pairing selector that previews each font's heading style with a sample text and marks the active selection with a gold checkmark.
frontend/src/components/templates/Templa: Renders a scaled 9:16 invitation card preview applying the selected template's colors, background style, border style, and layout density from form data.
Displays all invitation templates grouped by category in a labeled grid, with each card showing a styled preview thumbnail and selection state.
frontend/src/components/wizard/CoupleDet: A wizard step component for collecting couple details including names, wedding date/time, venue, family details, invitation message, and a drag-and-drop couple photo upload.
frontend/src/components/wizard/EventMana: A wizard step for managing wedding events (add, edit, delete), displaying them in a sorted grid of EventCards with an EventForm for creation and editing.
frontend/src/components/wizard/MediaMana: A wizard step that renders photo gallery upload and background music uploader components for adding media to the wedding invitation.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ProgressB: A step progress bar component that visually indicates completed, active, and upcoming wizard steps with a connecting animated line and labeled circles.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ReviewSte: A wizard review step that summarizes all invitation details and allows the user to set a unique URL slug before publishing, with slug validation feedback.
frontend/src/components/wizard/TemplateT: A wizard step for selecting and customizing the invitation template, color scheme, fonts, and background, with support for saving and applying multiple theme variants.
frontend/src/context/InvitationFormConte: Defines the React context and provider for the multi-step invitation form, managing all form state (couple details, events, theme, media) and exposing update helpers and step navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient and exposing status flags through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD for invitations, events, photos, RSVPs, background music, and theme config, each wired to the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Provides two IntersectionObserver-based hooks: useScrollAnimation for triggering visibility animations when an element enters the viewport, and useLazyLoad for lazy-loading images.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a luxury wedding design system with CSS custom properties for gold, crimson, blush, and ivory color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitationWizar: A multi-step wizard page for creating wedding invitations, handling form validation per step and sequentially submitting invitation data, events, photos, and background music to the backend on final submission.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying all user invitations as cards with options to edit, preview, publish, delete, and view RSVP responses, using skeleton loading and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/GuestInvitation.tsx: Renders the public-facing wedding invitation page for a given slug, fetching invitation data, events, photos, and music, then composing guest-facing sections (hero, countdown, couple intro, events, gallery, venue, RSVP) with loading and unpublished states.
frontend/src/pages/InvitationEditor.tsx: Provides the invitation editor UI with tabbed steps (couple details, events, template, media), publish/share modal, and RSVP responses modal, wired to React Query hooks for fetching and mutating invitation data.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing the app's features, sample invitation previews, and a hero section with parallax scrolling, linking users to sign up or view the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: 404 error page displayed when an invitation slug or route is not found, with navigation buttons back to the home page and dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/animations.ts: Exports reusable animation constants, easing curves, and Framer Motion-style variant objects (fadeIn, slideUp, scaleIn, stagger) along with helper functions for stagger delays and inline animation styles.
frontend/src/utils/eventIcons.tsx: Defines icon, color, and CSS class configurations for each wedding event type (haldi, mehndi, sangeet, wedding, reception, custom) and exports a lookup helper function.
frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.t: Declares the TemplateDefinition interface and exports an array of all available invitation templates with their color schemes, fonts, gradients, and metadata across royal-indian, modern-minimal, cinematic-dark, romantic, boho-floral, and vintage-rustic categories.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom luxury color palettes (gold, crimson, ivory, blush, etc.), serif font families, border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for an invitation app, documenting existing features around template library expansion, template selector enhancements, customization panel improvements, and theme-saving functionality in the invitation creation wizard.
